description: Style NoteStylish to the T. These vintage- inspired handbags from fossil come with a stylish upper and spacious inner. Crafted from imperial leather, these handbags double up as an accessory speaking volumes about your personality.Product DetailsTeal handbag with one main zipped compartment with organizer sleeves and a zipped pocketA zipped pocket on the frontA flap pocket at the back with magnetic button closureLong adjustable handle to carry style and easeKeyhole design in bronze dangling from the handle Key design branded zipperBrand badge appliqued on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 30 cmWidth: 33 cm
